Package org.eventb.core.ast.extension

Interface IExtensionKind

All Known Implementing Classes:
ExtensionKind
public interface IExtensionKind
Common protocol for describing the signature of an operator, that is the number of its children and their breakdown between expressions and predicates.
Since:
2.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    checkPreconditions(Expression[] childExprs, Predicate[] childPreds)
    Tells whether the given expressions and predicates are compatible with this operator kind.
    boolean
    checkTypePreconditions(Type[] typeParameters)
    Tells whether the given type parameters are compatible with this operator kind.
    IOperatorProperties
    getProperties()
    Returns the properties of this operator kind.

  • Method Details

    • getProperties

      IOperatorProperties getProperties()
      Returns the properties of this operator kind.
      Returns:
      the properties of this operator kind

    • checkPreconditions

      boolean checkPreconditions(Expression[] childExprs, Predicate[] childPreds)
      Tells whether the given expressions and predicates are compatible with this operator kind.
      Returns:
      true iff the number of expressions and predicates are valid

    • checkTypePreconditions

      boolean checkTypePreconditions(Type[] typeParameters)
      Tells whether the given type parameters are compatible with this operator kind.
      Returns:
      true iff the number of types are valid
      Since:
      3.0
